actions.title: AI agent orchestration landscape gap — category most comparison articles miss
actions.live_confirmation: blog index page shows May 29 posts, RSS feed active; direct URL 404 pending Rails build
actions.summary: Strategic comparison-page SEO post targeting the exact keyword gap discovered by publisher_discovery_lane: 8+ external comparison articles about AI agent orchestration that list LangGraph, CrewAI, AG2, Claude SDK etc but omit Ralph Workflow. Post explains the 'composite orchestration' category distinction and why RW isn't in framework comparisons because it's a different category — the orchestrator for agents you already have, not a framework to build new ones.
actions.expected_outcome: Organic traffic from comparison-article keyword queries; potential for being cited in future comparison articles
actions.kill_condition: No organic search impressions or traffic for comparison/landscape/orchestration keywords after 14 days

actions.title: Hold-cycle breaker deployed
actions.summary: Created hold_cycle_breaker.py — a watchdog that detects 2+ consecutive guard_pause/empty-board outcomes and auto-generates a content gap directive from publisher discovery data. Wired into POST_AUDIT_RUNTIME_SCRIPTS in marketing_loop_runner.py. This prevents future idle-hold regressions by defaulting to blog content creation when all distribution lanes are blocked.
actions.expected_outcome: No more idle measurement holds when blockers clear; auto-fallback to blog content creation
actions.kill_condition: If breaker suppresses blog content that was already recently deployed (6h check), that's correct behavior, not a false positive

context.distribution_lane_status: pause guard churn until fingerprint changes
